products.name: Custom ABS, Foam & Correx Sign Boards

lf_sides.label: One Side
lf_sides.tooltip: Choose whether the vinyl is applied to one side or both sides of the selected substrate (e.g. Correx, Foamboard, ABS). One Side applies vinyl to the front only. Both Sides applies vinyl to both the front and back of the substrate.

lf_sides.label: Both Sides
lf_sides.tooltip: Choose whether the vinyl is applied to one side or both sides of the selected substrate (e.g. Correx, Foamboard, ABS). One Side applies vinyl to the front only. Both Sides applies vinyl to both the front and back of the substrate.
